name: Tools Catalog
description: Essential CLI tools and utilities that enhance AI coding agent capabilities

tools.name: ripgrep
tools.description: Line-oriented search tool, 10-100x faster than grep. Respects .gitignore.
tools.install: brew install ripgrep / winget install BurntSushi.ripgrep.MSVC

tools.name: fd
tools.description: Friendly, fast alternative to find. Simpler syntax, colorized output.
tools.install: brew install fd / sudo apt install fd-find

tools.name: bat
tools.description: Cat clone with syntax highlighting, line numbers, and git integration.

tools.name: fzf
tools.description: General-purpose fuzzy finder. Interactively filter files, history, branches.

tools.name: eza
tools.description: Modern ls replacement with git integration, icons, tree view.

tools.name: zoxide
tools.description: Smarter cd command. Learns your habits and jumps to directories.

tools.name: dust
tools.description: Intuitive du replacement. Shows disk usage with visual bars.

tools.name: duf
tools.description: Better df alternative. Beautiful disk usage display.

tools.name: Yazi
tools.description: Blazing fast terminal file manager written in Rust.

tools.name: lazygit
tools.description: Terminal UI for git. Visual staging, stashing, rebating.

tools.name: GitHub CLI (gh)
tools.description: Official GitHub CLI. PRs, issues, actions, releases from terminal.

tools.name: delta
tools.description: Syntax-highlighting pager for git, diff, and grep output.

tools.name: tig
tools.description: Text-mode interface for git. Browser mode for git history.

tools.name: Gitui
tools.description: Blazing fast terminal-ui for git written in Rust.

tools.name: gh-dash
tools.description: GitHub CLI dashboard. Visual PR/issue management.

tools.name: Bun
tools.description: Incredibly fast JavaScript runtime, bundler, and package manager.

tools.name: pnpm
tools.description: Fast, disk-efficient package manager. Strict dependency resolution.

tools.name: uv
tools.description: Extremely fast Python package installer and resolver.

tools.name: Volta
tools.description: JavaScript tool manager. Pin node/npm/yarn versions per project.

tools.name: Corepack
tools.description: Zero-runtime-dependency Node.js package manager manager.

tools.name: Docker
tools.description: Container platform for building, shipping, running applications.

tools.name: Podman
tools.description: Daemonless container engine. Rootless, OCI-compatible Docker alternative.

tools.name: lazydocker
tools.description: Terminal UI for docker and docker-compose. Visual container management.

tools.name: dive
tools.description: Tool for exploring each layer in a Docker image. Optimize Dockerfiles.

tools.name: Docker Compose
tools.description: Define and run multi-container Docker applications.

tools.name: Terraform
tools.description: Infrastructure as Code tool for cloud provisioning.

tools.name: Ansible
tools.description: Agentless automation engine. Configuration management at scale.

tools.name: kubectl
tools.description: Kubernetes command-line tool. Deploy and manage containerized apps.

tools.name: K9s
tools.description: Terminal UI for Kubernetes. Real-time cluster monitoring.

tools.name: AWS CLI
tools.description: Official AWS command-line interface.

tools.name: gcloud CLI
tools.description: Google Cloud command-line interface.

tools.name: Claude Code
tools.description: Anthropic's agentic coding tool. Terminal-native AI pair programmer.

tools.name: Gemini CLI
tools.description: Google's AI coding agent in the terminal.

tools.name: Ollama
tools.description: Run LLMs locally. Llama, Mistral, Phi, Gemma, and more.

tools.name: Aider
tools.description: AI pair programming in your terminal. Works with GPT-4, Claude, local models.

tools.name: OpenCode
tools.description: Open-source AI coding agent. Multi-model support.

tools.name: Continue
tools.description: Open-source AI code assistant. VS Code and JetBrains.

tools.name: Cursor
tools.description: AI-first code editor. Fork of VS Code with AI superpowers.

tools.name: Codeium / Windsurf
tools.description: Free AI code completion and chat. Now Devin Desktop.

tools.name: codex-profiles
tools.description: Named CODEX_HOME profiles and macOS ChatGPT windows without copying auth tokens.

tools.name: Tree Ring Memory
tools.description: Local-first Rust CLI/TUI for AI-agent memory recall, forgetting, audit, and consolidation.

tools.name: Biome
tools.description: One toolchain for JS/TS/JSON/CSS. 35x faster than Prettier.

tools.name: Ruff
tools.description: Python linter and formatter. Replaces flake8, isort, black, and more.

tools.name: Prettier
tools.description: Opinionated code formatter. Supports many languages.

tools.name: ESLint
tools.description: Pluggable JavaScript linter. Catch errors early.

tools.name: ShellCheck
tools.description: Static analysis tool for shell scripts. Find bugs automatically.

tools.name: ty (TypeScript)
tools.description: Extremely fast TypeScript type checker written in Rust.

tools.name: pgcli
tools.description: PostgreSQL CLI with auto-completion and syntax highlighting.

tools.name: mycli
tools.description: MySQL CLI with auto-completion and syntax highlighting.

tools.name: litecli
tools.description: SQLite CLI with auto-completion and syntax highlighting.

tools.name: usql
tools.description: Universal command-line interface for SQL databases.

tools.name: Peppermint
tools.description: Modern database client with AI-powered query assistance.

tools.name: HTTPie
tools.description: User-friendly HTTP client. cURL for humans.

tools.name: Bruno
tools.description: Open-source API client. Git-native, offline-first Postman alternative.

tools.name: Hoppscotch
tools.description: Open-source API development ecosystem. Web + desktop.

tools.name: curl
tools.description: Command-line tool for transferring data with URLs.

tools.name: xh
tools.description: Friendly and fast tool for sending HTTP requests. Written in Rust.

tools.name: btop
tools.description: Resource monitor. Beautiful UI, GPU monitoring, mouse support.

tools.name: Glances
tools.description: System monitoring tool. Web-based and terminal.

tools.name: Netdata
tools.description: Real-time performance and health monitoring.

tools.name: dool
tools.description: Versatile resource statistics tool. vmstat/iostat/mpstat replacement.

tools.name: Starship
tools.description: Cross-shell prompt. Minimal, fast, customizable.

tools.name: tmux
tools.description: Terminal multiplexer. Split panes, sessions, persistent workspaces.

tools.name: Atuin
tools.description: Magic shell history. Search, sync, and share command history.

tools.name: Calliope CLI
tools.description: Multi-backend AI agent CLI with ACP/fleet modes. v3.0.0 with workflow automation engine and MCP server mode.

tools.name: Skills MCP Server
tools.description: Self-hostable, semantically-searchable agent skills registry delivered over MCP. 30+ bundled skills, Cloudflare Workers deployment.
